testimony: Rosa是蓝月亮的清洁工
Rosa is a cleaner at Blue Moon
Rosa从9点半开始在地下室走廊打扫
Rosa has been cleaning in the basement corridor since 9:30
Rosa暗示有人威胁她
Rosa implies someone is threatening her
Tommy是蓝月亮的酒吧经理
Tommy is the bar manager at Blue Moon
Tommy从晚上10点开始在办公室整理账本
Tommy has been organizing ledgers in the office since 10 PM
Tommy在11点30分听到一声枪响
Tommy heard a gunshot at 11:30 PM
Rosa大约12点半躲进了储藏室
Rosa hid in the storage room around half past twelve
Morrison空着手进出现场，没使用任何工具
Morrison went in and out of the scene empty-handed, without any tools
Morrison自称蓝月亮属于他的管辖范围
Morrison claims Blue Moon is under his jurisdiction
Morrison称自己11点半接到匿名线报之后立刻赶往现场
Morrison claims he immediately rushed to the scene after receiving an anonymous tip at 11:30 PM
Morrison声称与Webb仅限于公事公办的工作关系
Morrison claims his relationship with Webb was strictly business
Tommy曾去Morrison家给他送东西
Tommy has been to Morrison's house to deliver things
从Morrison家到蓝月亮酒吧开车最多15分钟
It takes at most fifteen minutes to drive from Morrison's house to Blue Moon
Morrison在午夜12点到达现场
Morrison arrived at the scene at midnight
Vivian从10点到11点10分在舞台上表演
Vivian performed on stage from 10:00 to 11:10
Jimmy是蓝月亮的主厨
Jimmy is the head chef at Blue Moon
Jimmy当天只上夜班，约晚上9点到达蓝月亮
Jimmy only worked the night shift that day, arrived at Blue Moon around 9pm
Jimmy声称23:10到近0:00一直在厨房工作，帮厨Tom和洗碗工可作证
Jimmy claims he was in the kitchen from 11:10pm to nearly midnight, helper Tom and dishwashers can vouch
Jimmy声称自己从没干过坏事
Jimmy claims he has never done anything bad
Rosa看到Jimmy带人进入Webb的会客室而非办公室
Rosa saw Jimmy take someone into Webb's parlor, not his office
案发当晚约23:00，Rosa看到Vivian紧张地携带小包走向会客室
On the night of the incident around 11pm, Rosa saw Vivian nervously carrying a small bag toward the parlor
Tommy看到Jimmy从Webb办公室抱出一个疑似古董的陶土水壶
Tommy saw Jimmy carrying what appeared to be an antique clay water jug out of Webb's office
Vivian最近取消了多场VIP包厢会客，Tommy认为她精神状态濒临崩溃
Vivian recently canceled multiple VIP private room appointments, Tommy believes she is on the verge of a mental breakdown
Vivian目睹Jimmy和另一人争吵后离开，两人脸色都很难看
Vivian witnessed Jimmy and another person leave after an argument, both looking very distressed
Tommy经常帮Vivian送东西传话，从不拒绝
Tommy often helps Vivian deliver things and pass messages, never refuses
Jimmy承认偷窃但否认杀人
Jimmy admits to theft but denies murder
Jimmy帮Webb送东西、收钱，充当跑腿
Jimmy delivered things and collected money for Webb, acting as his errand man
Jimmy想攒够钱获得公民身份
Jimmy wants to save enough money to obtain citizenship
最近2个月Webb和一个叫Rita的女人走得很近
In the last two months Webb got close to a woman named Rita
Webb早就立过遗嘱，英国有亲戚会来处理遗产
Webb already made a will, relatives in England will handle the estate
Webb出事时派对客人已全部离开，只剩下员工
When Webb died, all party guests had already left, only staff remained
Vivian约23:05去Webb会客室，门紧闭，敲门后有人喊'别打扰我'但没听清是谁
Vivian went to Webb's parlor around 11:05 PM, door was closed, heard someone shout 'Don't disturb me' after knocking but couldn't tell who
Tommy声称Webb只做私酒生意，没有其他业务
Tommy claims Webb only dealt in bootlegging, no other business
Vivian承认与Webb是3年秘密恋人，声称深爱他
Vivian admits to being Webb's secret lover for three years, claims she deeply loved him
死者应该就是Margaret，我基于现场情况做出的判断
The victim should be Margaret, I made this judgment based on the scene
我不认识Vinnie Moretti，Frank因赌博欠钱，我们是正常催款
I don't know Vinnie Moretti, Frank owed money from gambling, we were just collecting normally
Frank亲自签字借了$3,200贷款，协议条款完全合法
Frank personally signed the $3,200 loan, the agreement terms are completely legal
那个墨西哥女人最近才勾引我叔叔，她骗了他贷款还想要遗产
That Mexican woman recently seduced my uncle, she tricked him into a loan and wants the inheritance
我最近2、3个月没去过Frank那儿
I haven't been near Frank's place for two or three months
那天晚上我整晚在家，从没去过鞋坊
I was home all night, never went to the shoe shop
尸检报告需要明天才能完成，尸体烧得太严重，目前连性别都无法确定
The autopsy report won't be ready until tomorrow, the body is too severely burned, they can't even determine gender yet
银行的人来催款，还派了一个意大利人来威胁我
The bank people came to collect the debt, and even sent an Italian man to threaten me
Vinnie看到Leonard照片时口误说出Russo而非Ross
When Vinnie saw Leonard's photo, he accidentally said 'Russo' instead of 'Ross'
Leonard原名Russo，1915年左右改名为Ross，来源Moore银行入职档案
Leonard's original name was Russo, changed to Ross around 1915, from Moore Bank employment records
协议抬头不是Moore Bank Loan Agreement而是Moore Investment Company Investment Agreement
The agreement header is not 'Moore Bank Loan Agreement' but 'Moore Investment Company Investment Agreement'
我和Frank相识五年了，从1920年开始
Frank and I have known each other for five years, since 1920
我曾劝Frank别贷款，但他坚持要修好Margaret的地下室
I tried to talk Frank out of the loan, but he insisted on repairing Margaret's basement
我愿意按照Frank的意愿将房产捐给工人互助会
I'm willing to donate the property to the Workers' Mutual Aid Society as Frank wished
Vinnie每次来Silver Moon酒吧都说'今天又赚了一笔'，不像是还债的样子
Every time Vinnie comes to Silver Moon bar he says 'Made another buck today', doesn't sound like someone repaying debt
11月6日晚上8点20分左右，看到一个戴眼镜的西装男从鞋坊匆匆离开
Around 8:20 PM on November 6th, I saw a bespectacled man in a suit leaving the shoe shop in a hurry
11月6日晚上9点多，看到Vinnie从鞋坊出来，手里拿着打火机
After 9 PM on November 6th, I saw Vinnie coming out of the shoe shop, holding a lighter
11月6日晚上八点半我去鞋坊找Frank催债，我们吵起来了，我一怒之下杀了他，然后放火烧了现场
On the evening of November 6th at 8:30 PM I went to the shoe shop to collect Frank's debt, we argued, I killed him in a rage, then set fire to the scene
我叫Danny Kowalski，Frank是我叔叔，我一直住在他家里，帮他打理日常
I'm Danny Kowalski, Frank is my uncle, I've been living at his place and helping with daily affairs
11月6日晚上我在赌场待到快九点，回家路上看到鞋坊那边有烟，但我没过去
On the evening of November 6th I was at the casino until almost 9, saw smoke near the shoe shop on the way home but I didn't go over
Foster法医初步判断起火点在一楼店面，地下室反而烧损较轻，呈现典型人为纵火特征
Coroner Foster's preliminary finding is that the fire started on the first floor, the basement suffered less damage, showing typical signs of arson
Frank在1912年港口事故中受过重伤，腿脚一直不太方便
Frank was seriously injured in the 1912 port accident, his legs have never been quite right since
我在Moore银行工作十年了，负责南区的贷款催收业务
I've been working at Moore Bank for ten years, handling loan collection in the South Side
Leonard是我最得力的催收员，南区的贷款业务基本都是他在跑
Leonard is my best debt collector, he handles almost all the loan business in the South Side
我和Frank在1920年Mercy Hospital认识的，他因港口旧伤住院，我是那里的护士
Frank and I met at Mercy Hospital in 1920, he was hospitalized for old port injuries, I was a nurse there
南区好几家老住户最近都被逼搬走了，都是欠了Moore银行的钱
Several longtime South Side residents have been forced out recently, all owed money to Moore Bank
叔叔最初只借了600美元修房子，后来不知道怎么就涨成了3200
Uncle originally only borrowed $600 to fix the house, somehow it ballooned to $3,200
叔叔跟O'Malley家是老邻居，1912年港口事故的时候在同一个工区
Uncle was old neighbors with the O'Malleys, they worked in the same section during the 1912 port accident
Frank最近在整理一些银行相关的文件，说要去举报他们
Frank has been sorting through some bank-related documents recently, says he's going to report them
Frank最近总是很焦虑，晚上经常一个人坐着发呆，但他不肯告诉我原因
Frank has been very anxious lately, often sitting alone in a daze at night, but he won't tell me why
